agent-name.description: Record naming a Claude subagent or delegated worker.
agent-name.future_use: Could label merged subagent transcripts more precisely in the UI.

custom-title.description: Record storing a user-defined or agent-defined conversation title.
custom-title.future_use: Could override slug generation with provider-native custom titles.

file-history-snapshot.description: Record capturing Claude file-backup state while editing local files.
file-history-snapshot.future_use: Could power file-history browsing or restore-oriented transcript views.

last-prompt.description: Record storing the latest prompt text for a Claude conversation.
last-prompt.future_use: Could improve conversation previews when the full user message is unavailable.

pr-link.description: Record linking a Claude session to a pull request.
pr-link.future_use: Could surface PR badges or repository-aware filters in the browser.

progress.description: Record streaming Claude progress updates outside the main user or assistant transcript.
progress.future_use: Could expose progress timelines or background-task diagnostics.

queue-operation.description: Record describing enqueue, dequeue, or removal events in Claude's background work queue.
queue-operation.future_use: Could reconstruct delegated-task lifecycle and queue history.

summary.description: Record storing a compact provider-generated summary for a session or branch.
summary.future_use: Could provide native summary previews without re-summarizing transcripts.

agentId.description: Identifier for the Claude subagent that produced a progress record.
agentId.future_use: Could strengthen subagent grouping and provenance in merged transcripts.

agentName.description: Human-readable name associated with a Claude subagent record.
agentName.future_use: Could label background workers and delegated runs in the UI.

apiError.description: Short API error code attached to synthetic Claude assistant error messages.
apiError.future_use: Could classify provider transport failures separately from transcript content.

content.description: Top-level content body used by non-message Claude records such as queue or system events.
content.future_use: Could surface local-command output, queue notifications, or compaction notices.

customTitle.description: Top-level custom title stored on Claude custom-title records.
customTitle.future_use: Could override generated conversation names with provider-native titles.

data.description: Structured progress payload emitted during Claude background or hook execution.
data.future_use: Could power richer progress timelines and hook diagnostics.

entrypoint.description: Entry point label showing how a Claude session was started.
entrypoint.future_use: Could distinguish CLI, resumed, or integration-started sessions.

imagePasteIds.description: Identifiers tracking pasted images attached to a Claude user record.
imagePasteIds.future_use: Could link pasted image assets back to prompt attachments.

isApiErrorMessage.description: Boolean marker identifying a synthetic Claude assistant message as an API error wrapper.
isApiErrorMessage.future_use: Could hide or style API failures differently from normal assistant replies.

isCompactSummary.description: Boolean marker indicating a summary record came from a compaction step.
isCompactSummary.future_use: Could distinguish regular summaries from compaction-produced summaries.

isSnapshotUpdate.description: Boolean marker telling whether a file-history snapshot extends a previous snapshot.

isVisibleInTranscriptOnly.description: Boolean marker for Claude records intended only for transcript rendering.
isVisibleInTranscriptOnly.future_use: Could refine what participates in previews, search, or default browser counts.

lastPrompt.description: Top-level prompt text stored by Claude last-prompt records.
lastPrompt.future_use: Could improve previews or restore recent prompt context.

leafUuid.description: Leaf transcript node identifier attached to Claude summary records.
leafUuid.future_use: Could anchor summaries to specific transcript branches or leaves.

level.description: Logging severity attached to Claude system records.
level.future_use: Could differentiate info, warning, and error system events in transcript views.

logicalParentUuid.description: Logical parent identifier used to relate Claude system records to prior nodes.
logicalParentUuid.future_use: Could improve branching reconstruction for hidden system records.

messageId.description: Top-level message identifier attached to Claude file-history snapshots.
messageId.future_use: Could link file-history state back to the message that caused it.

operation.description: Queue operation verb such as enqueue, dequeue, or remove.
operation.future_use: Could reconstruct delegated-work queue history in the browser.

parentToolUseID.description: Identifier of the parent tool invocation that spawned a Claude progress record.
parentToolUseID.future_use: Could anchor progress streams back to the originating tool call.

parentUuid.description: Parent transcript node identifier attached to Claude records.
parentUuid.future_use: Could help reconstruct exact provider-side parent-child ordering.

permissionMode.description: Claude permission mode active when the user record was created.
permissionMode.future_use: Could explain plan-mode or execution-mode behavior in transcripts.

planContent.description: Full plan text stored on some Claude user records.
planContent.future_use: Could backfill plans without re-parsing only the message body.

prNumber.description: Pull request number attached to Claude PR-link records.
prNumber.future_use: Could render compact PR references in browser metadata.

prRepository.description: Repository slug attached to Claude PR-link records.
prRepository.future_use: Could support repository filters or outbound links.

prUrl.description: Pull request URL attached to Claude PR-link records.
prUrl.future_use: Could expose clickable PR links from the browser or viewer header.

promptId.description: Claude prompt identifier attached to some user records with richer attachment state.
promptId.future_use: Could deduplicate prompt assets or correlate pasted media with prompts.

requestId.description: Claude request identifier attached to assistant transport records.
requestId.future_use: Could aid debugging of provider-side failures or retries.

snapshot.description: Snapshot payload describing tracked file backups for a Claude file-history record.
snapshot.future_use: Could show which files were modified at each backup point.

sourceToolAssistantUUID.description: Assistant UUID associated with the originating tool result for a Claude user record.
sourceToolAssistantUUID.future_use: Could reconnect pasted or transformed content back to its generating assistant turn.

sourceToolUseID.description: Tool invocation identifier attached to Claude user records derived from prior tool output.
sourceToolUseID.future_use: Could preserve provenance between user follow-ups and source tool results.

summary.description: Top-level summary text stored in Claude summary records.
summary.future_use: Could populate provider-native conversation summaries in the browser.

todos.description: Structured to-do metadata attached to some Claude user records.
todos.future_use: Could preserve task lists or planning state in future transcript features.

toolUseID.description: Tool invocation identifier attached to Claude progress records.
toolUseID.future_use: Could link progress updates to exact tool calls or background commands.

userType.description: Provider-side user classification attached to Claude envelope records.
userType.future_use: Could distinguish external users from internal or synthetic record sources.

uuid.description: Provider UUID assigned to an individual Claude record.
uuid.future_use: Could support stable cross-links, branch reconstruction, or precise anchors.

container.description: Claude message container metadata present on newer assistant transport records.
container.future_use: Could preserve transport context or provider-side grouping information.

context_management.description: Context-management metadata nested on Claude assistant message objects.
context_management.future_use: Could explain compaction decisions or provider context controls.

id.description: Provider message identifier nested in Claude assistant message objects.
id.future_use: Could connect fragments, retries, or tool results back to a provider message id.

stop_sequence.description: Claude stop sequence value nested on assistant message objects.
stop_sequence.future_use: Could preserve provider stop markers for debugging or transcript fidelity.

cache_creation.description: Nested cache-creation breakdown inside Claude usage metadata.
cache_creation.future_use: Could enable more detailed cache token charts or debugging.

inference_geo.description: Inference geography marker nested in Claude usage metadata.
inference_geo.future_use: Could help diagnose regional latency or provider routing issues.

iterations.description: Iteration metadata nested in Claude usage objects.
iterations.future_use: Could expose provider retry or iterative generation details.

image.description: Claude image content block embedded in a message content array.
image.future_use: Could render attached images or show richer media markers in transcripts.
